---
applyTo: "**/*.html"
---
Semantic HTML5. Accessibility: aria-labels on interactive elements.
SVG icons inline, 18x18 default. Stroke-based, no fill.
Cards follow component-section pattern: h3 > svg + title, p.desc, div.tags.
Layer sections: expandable via layer-band class + toggleLayer().
New sections need connector divs between them.
